text: The darkness and tilted perspective leave me unsettled, as though I am wandering through an unfamiliar institute after hours. The silence and emptiness provoke thoughts about purpose—what knowledge lies locked behind these glass walls? The R&D sign radiates cold ambition, a reminder of the impersonal march of progress. I feel both curious and uneasy, as if I am trespassing in spaces meant for brighter hours and busier minds.
